texto: This first glance of a soul which does not yet know itself is like dawn in the heavens
autor: it is the awakening of something radiant and unknown.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a it is the awakening of something radiant and unknown.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “This first glance of a soul which does not yet know itself is like dawn in the heavens” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, victor-hugo, les-miserables pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de les-miserables.
